name: Amanda Anderson-Pleiss
title: Advanced Practice Provider
bio: Amanda graduated with her Masters Degree in Adult-Gerontology Acute Care Nurse Practitioner in 2020. Prior to that she has 10 years experience as a RN, mostly in the ICU. Prior to joining CCPSA, Amanda has 2 years of experience in Pulmonary & Sleep Medicine both inpatient & outpatient. Amanda is married with one daughter. She enjoys gardening & traveling with her family in her free time.
